mapper.update: CREATE TABLE ${tableName} ( `media_id` Int64 DEFAULT 0, `did` String DEFAULT '', `did_type` Int8 DEFAULT 0, `imei` String DEFAULT '', `oaid` String DEFAULT '', `android_id` String DEFAULT '', `mac` String DEFAULT '', `make` String DEFAULT '', `model` String DEFAULT '', `osv` String DEFAULT '', `width` Int64 DEFAULT 0, `height` Int64 DEFAULT 0, `ua` String DEFAULT '', `address_id` Int64 DEFAULT 0 ) ENGINE = ReplacingMergeTree() PARTITION BY media_id PRIMARY KEY did ORDER BY did SETTINGS index_granularity = 8192 ;

insert into ${tableName}(media_id,did,did_type,imei,oaid,android_id,mac,make,model,osv,width,height,ua,address_id) select toInt64(substring(replaceAll(replaceAll(replaceAll(ad_id, 'A', ''),'S',''),'O',''), 1, 5)) as media_id, case when imei is not null then imei when oaid is not null then oaid when idfa is not null then idfa else '' end as did, case when imei is not null then 1 when oaid is not null then 5 when idfa is not null then 6 else 0 end as did_type, imei, oaid, android_id, mac, lower(case when manu is not null and manu != '' then manu when brand is not null and brand != '' then brand else '' end) as make, lower(model) as model, osv, width, height, ua, address_id from device_log_all dla where log_time >= #{startTime} and log_time < #{endTime} and request_filter_type = 0 and ad_id is not null and ad_id != '' and did != '' and did is not null and did != 'null' and make != '' and make != model ;
mapper.select: select did, 1 as didType from ( select x_android_id as did, toYYYYMMDD(last_update_time) as day, count() as dcount from statics_imp_new_all sina where last_update_time >= #{startTime} and log_time < #{endTime} and ip != up_ip and did != '' group by did,day having count() > 5 ) union all select did, did_type as didType from ad.x_black_did_all
